name: Documentary
description: News / documentary — restrained, factual, sans-serif, single accent
use_for: explainers, factual reporting, data stories, journalistic content

dominant.role: clean white backdrop, large negative space

accent.role: single emphasis tag, breaking-news bar, stat callout

flux.positive_prefix: Documentary 3:2 photojournalism still, candid observational moment, plain available-light realism, neutral journalistic color with natural skin tones and real-world hues, factual subject context visible in the environment, newspaper-feature register (New York Times / Magnum-archive sensibility).
flux.positive_suffix: Observational distance, candid posture, imperfect real environment, available daylight or window light, no heroic low angles, no staged tableau.

always_add: imperfect real environment with factual context
neutral lens, no heroic low angle
neutral journalistic palette (real skin tones, real-world hues)

native_canvas.rationale: photojournalism (NYT / Magnum) — 3:2 is the 35mm / DSLR documentary register; 1248×832 = FLUX-trained 3:2 bucket, both dims /16
